docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $147.00 FILED BY TWEGBE, ETTA AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT TODAY IN COURT. DEFENDANT ANNA BROWN APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: SZ. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANNA BROWN IS GRANTED. (CLERK-BETH WILBER)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY PLAINTIFF TWEGBE, ETTA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNA HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COURT ORDER TO CONTINUE HEARING ON MOTION TO VACATE JUDGEMENT AND APPROVAL FOR DEFT TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE, FILED.
ALTERNATIVE ADDRESS FOR DEFT ANNA BROWN: C/O LI GAILORD, P.O.BOX 2341, OAKLAND CA 94614

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TWEGBE, ETTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNA $147.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $177.00, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED FROM PLAINTIFF. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;FANNY RAYRAY; NOT REPORTED (506) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR THE PURPOSE OF ENTERING THE JUDGMENT HEARING SET FOR JUN-20-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ANNA BROWN SET FOR JUN-13-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-20-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. PER COURT ORDER. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT NOT AVAILABLE ON JUNE 13, 2008.
